active_work.text: GLLVM.jl Gate 0/1 route evidence is now local for ordinary Poisson, Binomial logit, and NB2 selected-entry B_lv profile-LR: ADEMP note recorded, test/test_lv_ci.jl canaries B_lv[1,1] with finite endpoints and known DGP truth inclusion, and the focused LV CI test passed 162/162 in 3m26.5s. This is not coverage calibration, R bridge profile/bootstrap transport, source-specific lv support, mixed-family CI support, or unique= parity. No compute is active.

Native GLLVM.jl profile-LR selected-entry B_lv hardening is implemented in the handover worktree: profile_ci and family profile routes now expose bounded refit/profile controls, and confint_lv_effects(..., method = :profile, profile_indices = ...) profiles selected entries of vec(B_lv). Bootstrap remains secondary and cost-bounded. R bridge X_lv profile/bootstrap transport, R-vs-Julia parity, coverage calibration, source-specific lv exposure, mixed-family CIs, and PR #127 reopening remain blocked or pending. No active compute.

Concurrent unique= work is a separate R/TMB-first lane. This LV closeout does not touch spatial_latent(..., unique=), phylo_latent(..., unique=), *_unique() compatibility, or Julia spatial/phylo unique parity. Join only after the R contract is green and a separate parity gate is opened.

Remaining unblocked LV work is closed: ordinary LV is covered, B_eta_realized Gate 0-3 evidence is frozen for the changed target, structural source guards and bridge truth are verified through Gates 0-2, and the next work moves to a separate GLLVM capability slice. No source-specific grammar exposure, PR #127 reopen, API widening, large compute, non-Gaussian inheritance, or mixed-family CI claim.

Gates 0-2 are locally verified for the structural-dependence LV truth-lock: source-specific lv = ~ env guards are fail-loud, structural random-slope syntax is separated from lv grammar, R and Julia bridge ledgers reconcile with named drift, and mixed-family vectors remain point/postfit only. No API widening, source-specific lv exposure, PR reopen, Totoro/DRAC compute, or public support claim.
Default axis_effect alpha SE/CIs plus explicit trait_effect B_lv SE/CIs are on main at 12526a15. Post-merge R-CMD-check and pkgdown are green.

Widget now reports 18 covered, 3 partial, 0 ready, 0 active rows, 0 queued rows, and 5 blocked LV rows. Gate 2 diagnostic and Gate 3 DRAC claim evidence passed; public/source-specific exposure still waits for maintainer authorization.

GLLVM.jl phylo Model A is retired/parked for public v1 exposure under the current population-B_lv target. Future reopening requires structural redesign with fresh ADEMP evidence. Method lock: no bootstrap rescue; profile-LR is only a selected-entry truth-inclusion canary after a genuinely new target/regime is named; alpha Wald output is conditional axis/access-effect output. The local seed-matched task-8 entry-71 profile_truth canary missed truth with LR 9.9918 > 3.8415, and the K=1 20-replicate profile gate covered only 98/100 selected entries. Same-route Wald, t-Wald, percentile, bootstrap_basic, and endpoint-profile reruns are retired; no production fan-out or source-specific lv grammar exposure follows.

Diagnostic-only local K=1 Gaussian Model A profile_truth wave at p=20, n_sites=200, lambda=0.5 fired the stop rule: 20/20 fits converged, 100/100 selected entries were usable, but only 98/100 included truth. Converged misses were task 15 entry 10 (LR 4.942) and task 19 entry 20 (LR 5.143), above the 3.841 cutoff. Do not scale K=1 profile, bootstrap, Wald, t-Wald, percentile, or endpoint-profile reruns; source-specific phylo lv remains blocked.

Phylo Model A v1 public exposure is parked. A future changed realized/sampling-conditional target would require fresh ADEMP evidence before any grammar exposure. Wald is fine only for conditional alpha axis/access-effect output. Profile-LR remains the canary for a changed target, not a continuation of the failed population-B_lv route. No bootstrap, source-specific grammar exposure, PR reopen, or production compute is active.

Bench-only profile_direct_slope canary computes B_lv_direct_slope from saturated Y ~ X_lv slopes and constrains selected B_lv entries to that realized target. Tiny local smoke at p=5,n_sites=60,K=1,lambda=0.5 passed 2/2 selected entries with LR 0.0895 and 1.6022 below 3.8415. This is diagnostic tooling only: no source-specific lv grammar, no production compute, no bootstrap rescue, and no population B_lv claim.

Early realized-target profile_direct_slope canaries were positive: K=1 p=20,n_sites=200 five-seed selected-entry wave passed 25/25 with max LR 3.6595 < 3.8415, and old failed population-target task-8 entry-71 at p=80,K=2 passed under B_lv_direct_slope with LR 0.00569 < 3.8415. Superseded by the 20-rep strict-gate result below.

K=1 profile_direct_slope promotion diagnostic fired the strict stop rule: 20/20 fits converged, 100/100 selected entries usable, and 96/100 included B_lv_direct_slope, but four converged entries missed the LR cutoff. Aggregate coverage is nominal-compatible at this small denominator, but the no-miss canary failed. Do not expose source-specific phylo lv; same-route scaling is retired.

Public source-specific phylo lv is retired/parked for v1 under the current evidence. PR #127 remains closed/parked, phylo_latent(..., lv = ~ x) stays fail-loud, no compute is active, and any future work must start with a newly predeclared ADEMP target/gate before profile-LR, Totoro diagnostics, DRAC claim evidence, or R grammar exposure resumes.

Truth-lock slice: source guards stay covered/fail-loud, mixed-family bridge is complete balanced Gaussian + Poisson + Binomial point/postfit only, and bridge-matrix drift must be gate-labelled. Boole owns source grammar, Hopper owns R-Julia bridge truth, Fisher blocks interval overclaims, Curie owns focused guard tests, Grace owns preview refresh, and Rose blocks partial-support wording. No API widening, source-specific lv exposure, PR reopen, or compute launch.

No-compute design recorded: the only candidate restart was eta-scale realized B_eta_realized with selected-entry profile-LR. This 06:24 row is superseded by the 09:14 Gate 0 row, the 09:32 strict Gate 1 failure row, and the 09:48 corrected Gate 1 row. Gate 2 Totoro diagnostic is complete; DRAC claim evidence later passed; source-specific lv grammar and PR #127 reopening remain blocked pending maintainer authorization.

Gate 0 is implemented locally in GLLVM.jl: B_eta_realized truth helper, orientation/centering unit test 7/7, bench include smoke, and one tiny profile_eta_realized smoke with fit/constrained solve converged and LR 0.4156 < 3.8415. Full core suite was interrupted after about 31 minutes in an unrelated zero-inflated/two-part path, so this is not a full-suite-green claim. This row is superseded by the 09:32 strict Gate 1 failure row and the 09:48 corrected Gate 1 row.

Gate 1 local B_eta_realized positive-control diagnostic failed the original strict no-miss rule: 20 planned reps x 5 predeclared entries = 100 selected entries; 84/100 planned covered, 84/87 usable covered, task 3 fit did not converge, tasks 9/12/14/20 were profile-underconverged, and converged LR misses occurred at task 7 entry 9, task 8 entry 9, and task 11 entry 11. This row is superseded by the 09:48 corrected optimizer-budget diagnostic, but the no-miss rule still fails.

Corrected local B_eta_realized Gate 1 reran the same 20 seeds and five entries with fit/profile optimizer budgets of 1000. Usability was fixed: 20/20 fits converged, 100/100 profile truth solves were usable, and selected-entry truth inclusion was 97/100 with MCSE 0.0171. This row is superseded by the Gate 2 Totoro diagnostic row, which passed 100/100.

Totoro-only B_eta_realized weak-cell diagnostic passed from clean GLLVM.jl commit 41a4120: 20/20 fits converged, 100/100 selected-entry profile truth solves usable, 100/100 covered, MCSE 0.0000, Wilson 95% 0.9630 to 1.0000, max LR 2.6733 < 3.8415, zero misses. This authorizes Gate 3 DRAC claim-evidence planning only; no source-specific R grammar, PR #127 reopen, public support claim, or bootstrap rescue follows.

Gate 3 DRAC claim evidence passed on Nibi job 17049809: 500/500 fits converged, 2500/2500 selected entries usable, 2495/2500 covered = 0.998000000, MCSE 0.000890835, Wilson 95 percent 0.995326484 to 0.999145426, 5 LR misses, and 0 non-empty error logs. This is DRAC-only evidence for the non-v1 B_eta_realized target; no source-specific R grammar or PR #127 reopen follows without explicit maintainer authorization.

Evidence packet frozen in the GLLVM.jl handover worktree. Rose/Ada claim audit keeps Gate 3 as internal evidence for B_eta_realized only: old population-B_lv remains retired, source-specific phylo lv exposure remains blocked, and non-Gaussian/source-specific structural models must start as separate derivation and ADEMP gates.

Current LV arc is closed as a truth-lock: ordinary LV is covered, phylo Gaussian Model A B_eta_realized Gate 0-3 evidence is frozen, source-specific lv = ~ env is fail-loud for source-specific structural keywords and legacy aliases, mixed-family remains point/postfit only, and non-Gaussian/source-specific structural LV starts a separate gated arc.

evidence.text: Focused GLLVM.jl tests passed for the profile-first slice: profile_ci 8/8; non-Gaussian confidence intervals 124/124; X_lv confint_lv_effects 139/139; phylo x X_lv Model A 25/25; bridge capabilities 105/105; bridge CI routing 64/64; bridge fixed-effect X 195/195; bridge missing-response mask 83/83; mixed-family bridge metadata 18/18.

GLLVM.jl handover note 2026-07-02-lv-arc-final-closeout-and-next-capabilities.md reconciles the evidence ladders: Phylo Gaussian Model A is internally closed through Gate 0-3 for B_eta_realized, structural-dependence guards are closed through Gates 0-2, and future public/source-specific/non-Gaussian/mixed-family work is a new gated goal.

Focused verification passed: canonical source guards 82 pass / 3 INLA skips; R Julia bridge 380 pass / 14 GLLVM.jl-path skips; ordinary latent random-regression 23 pass / 7 CRAN skips; mixed-family stage smoke 6 pass; Julia bridge capabilities 63 pass, mixed-family 18 pass, fixed-effect X 195 pass, missing-mask 83 pass, and CI routing 64 pass.
Post-merge main R-CMD-check run 28476941515 passed at 12526a15.
Post-merge pkgdown run 28477809749 built and deployed successfully at 12526a15.
Deployed reference page confirms axis_effect default, conf.level, alpha_lv_B SEs, and ADREPORT(B_lv_unit) SEs.
B_eta_realized profile_eta_realized Gate 2 completed on Totoro: 20/20 result files, 100/100 usable selected entries, 100/100 covered, max LR 2.6733 below 3.8415.

Nibi SLURM job 17049809_[1-500%100] completed and was reduced from /scratch/snakagaw/phylo_model_a_gate3_20260701-1122/results: 500 result files, 500 detail files, 0 non-empty error logs, 2495/2500 covered.

Parser guard now rejects lv = ~ env across phylo, spatial, animal, and kernel structural keywords and legacy aliases before desugaring can silently drop it. Focused canonical keyword test passes with 82 pass / 3 INLA skips after pkgload::load_all().

blockers.text: Native GLLVM.jl selected-entry B_lv profile-LR does not imply gllvmTMB/R bridge X_lv profile or bootstrap transport. Bridge X_lv remains Wald payload only; R-vs-Julia parity and coverage calibration remain pending; mixed-family and source-specific X_lv CIs remain blocked.

Do not spend more cores on bootstrap_basic/Wald/t-Wald/percentile/profile endpoint repeats for the current phylo weak cell. Bootstrap is not the next route. The local profile_truth canaries missed task 8 entry 71 and the K=1 20-replicate gate, profile_direct_slope failed its strict K=1 20-replicate gate at 96/100 with four converged misses, and original B_eta_realized Gate 1 failed the no-miss rule at 84/100 planned entries. Corrected local Gate 1 reached 97/100 with 100/100 usable, but Gate 2 has passed; Gate 3 DRAC claim evidence passed, but public/source-specific exposure remains blocked pending maintainer authorization. Public source-specific phylo lv is retired/parked for v1; any future path needs a new method decision before compute.

B_eta_realized is implemented from the noiseless eta-scale latent-mediated surface and centering/orientation is proven against an independent dense calculation. This is still only the minimal evidence gate; it did not by itself authorize the later Totoro diagnostic, DRAC, source-specific lv grammar, or PR #127 reopening.

Keep alpha axis_effect and B_lv trait_effect language distinct. Alpha Wald output is conditional axis/access-effect output; do not call source-specific phylo lv partial support after the profile_truth misses, the profile_direct_slope strict-gate failure, or the original B_eta_realized no-miss failure. Corrected Gate 1 97/100 is a gate-rule decision point, not support.

Source-specific phylo/animal/spatial/kernel lv syntax remains fail-loud across scalar, unique, indep, dep, latent, and legacy-alias spellings. Ordinary latent(lv = ~ x) evidence must not be reused to promote phylo_latent(..., lv = ~ x), spatial_latent(..., lv = ~ x), animal_latent(..., lv = ~ x), or kernel_latent(..., lv = ~ x). Structural random-slope syntax such as spatial_latent(1 + env | site, d = K) is a separate route, not predictor-informed lv grammar.

Mixed-family X_lv, fixed X, masks, missing responses, and CIs remain blocked. The admitted bridge row is point/postfit only for complete balanced Gaussian + Poisson + Binomial vectors, and unsupported mixed components are now named by GJL-GATE-MIXED-COMPONENTS.

serial_gates.text: Use profile-LR selected entries for admitted ordinary B_lv routes before any new compute or R grammar exposure. Bootstrap is secondary; source-specific and mixed-family profile claims stay gated.

Close the current LV arc without widening syntax: ordinary LV is covered, B_eta_realized evidence is frozen, source-specific lv guards are fail-loud, mixed-family is point/postfit only, and non-Gaussian/source-specific structural LV moves to a new derivation/ADEMP arc.
PR #581 is merged and post-merge main/pkgdown are green.

The profile-LR truth canary did not pass for task 8 entry 71, the K=1 population-target gate covered only 98/100 after converged misses, profile_direct_slope failed the strict K=1 20-replicate no-miss canary despite 96/100 aggregate coverage, and original B_eta_realized Gate 1 failed the no-miss rule. Corrected local Gate 1 is 97/100 with 100/100 usable. Source-specific phylo lv is retired/parked for v1. Future exposure requires an approved MCSE-aware gate and fresh evidence; Gate 2 has passed; Gate 3 passed. Do not restart bootstrap.
Do not widen mixed-family bridge claims beyond the complete balanced Gaussian + Poisson + Binomial point/postfit row. Mixed-family X/X_lv/masks/CIs require a separate parity slice and evidence gate.

Do not inherit Gaussian Gate 3 evidence into non-Gaussian or broader structural models. Each family/source combination needs a named estimand, derivation, ADEMP gate, and claim audit before compute, bridge promotion, or public wording.
